title: BUG #17271: Updating enum columns type fails when constraints exist
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE example (id UInt64, direction Enum8('UP' = 1, 'DOWN' = 2) NOT NULL, below UInt8 NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE example ADD CONSTRAINT ck_example_direction CHECK ((direction = 'DOWN' AND below = 1) OR (below = 0));
ALTER TABLE example MODIFY COLUMN direction Enum8('UP' = 1, 'DOWN' = 2, 'UNKNOWN' = 3);
ALTER TABLE example DROP CONSTRAINT ck_example_direction;
ALTER TABLE example ADD CONSTRAINT ck_example_direction CHECK ((direction = 'DOWN' AND below = 1) OR (below = 0));
key_bug_features: Updating enum columns type with existing constraints
